REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (761 Rolph St, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michelle Domingo appeared via zoom for Lakshmi Yabut.
Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for Jennifer Cayanan (objector).

Discussion was held regarding the sale of the property, that an addendum was signed to reflect the $2000 increase in the purchase price to meet the 90% requirement, that Ms. Ebey's client waives notice, and that court shall waive any defects. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Robles. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (761 Rolph St, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Continued To Nov-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michelle S. Domingo for executor Lakhsmi Khiani Yabut (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for respondent Jennifer Cayanan (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property.

Ms. Domingo reported that the inventory and appraisal had been sent to the probate referee and that the referee recently confirmed the inventory and appraisal report would be sent to her office by Wednesday, 10/15/2025.

The Court noted that the petition appeared to have authority to complete the sale without court confirmation and inquired why confirmation was being sought. Ms. Domingo explained that her client wished to have court approval due to a prior appeal and history of delays. Ms. Ebey agreed that court approval was appropriate in case a formal objection was pursued and that the sale should go forward. Counsel also noted that no objection had brought following the appeal.

The Court stated that because the inventory and appraisal had not yet been filed, it could not approve the sale at this time. The matter was continued to November 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for respondent Jennifer Cayanan, who was also present (via Zoom).
Michelle S. Domingo for executor Lakhsmi Khiani Yabut, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on status of close of estate.

The Court informed the parties that it intended to take the status hearing off calendar, in light of the recently filed petition for approval of report on status of administration. Neither counsel raised any objection. The matter was taken off calendar accordingly.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Denied

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Domingo appeared by zoom for and with Lakhsmi Yabut by zoom.
Cesar Fumar appeared by zoom for and with Depak Khiani (objector/petitioner) in person.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Jenn Cayanan (objector).

The parties presented oral argument in response to the allegations that were made in the declaration by Depak Khiani that is pending in the e-file queue, and to support their positions with respect to their petitions. Upon conclusion of argument, the court denied the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed filed by Depak Khiani. The court also granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary filed by Lakhsmi Khiani Yabut overruling the objections. The will dated November 2, 1993, is admitted to probate. Lakhsmi Khiana Yabut is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either petition is to be filed two weeks before the hearing. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Domingo appeared by zoom for and with Lakhsmi Yabut by zoom.
Cesar Fumar appeared by zoom for and with Depak Khiani (objector/petitioner) in person.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Jenn Cayanan (objector).

Mr. Fumar requested 10 to 14-days to respond to the tentative ruling and review the file, stated that he will file a declaration superseding the two additional petitions, that his client has not located a will and that his client will be filing another form of petition. The court informed Mr. Fumar that there needs to be a copy of the will. Mrs. Domingo stated that this matter has been continued five times, that the procedural issues have not been addressed despite the petitioner having had two attorneys, and that any further delay would be unduly prejudicial to her client. Mrs. Domingo also stated that she was informed that the value of the property has decreased by $100,000.00. Mrs. Ebey stated that she is confused as to whether there is or is not a will, that her client informed her that the property is costing the estate money to keep it vacant and requested that a continuance be denied. Further discussion was held regarding the appointment of a temporary administrator, Mrs. Domingo's client being appointed if that is the case, etc. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to August 19, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If nothing persuasive is on file by then, the court will take action on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Domingo appeared by zoom for and with Lakhsmi Yabut by zoom.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Jen Cayanan (objector).
Depak Khiani in propria persona.

Mr. Khiani stated that his attorney just retired, requested a 60-day continuance to get a new attorney and stated that he has an appointment today at 11:30 with another attorney. Mrs. Domingo objected, stating that several continuances have already been granted. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed, and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to August 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Khiani the opportunity to obtain new counsel.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan West appeared by zoom for Depak Khiani.
Michelle Domingo appeared by zoom for and with Lakhsmi Yabut by zoom.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Jen Cayanan by zoom.

Mr. West stated that he just got involved 10 days ago, that he needs time to look it over and that he is sure that some discovery will be needed. The court noted that there are significant procedural issues with the petition that Mr. West is taking over. Mrs. Ebey stated that her client is contesting Depak and supporting Lakhsmi. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed, and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court advised the parties to meet and confer.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Domingo appeared by zoom for and with Lakhsmi Yabut (petitioner) by zoom.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Jennifer Cayanan (objector) by zoom.
Scott Bassin and Douglas Bassin specially appearing on a limited scope for and with Depak Khiani (will contestant/petitioner) in person.

The court stated that Mr. Khiani has filed two petitions, that he may want to withdraw one, that the petitions are premature due to procedural/notice issues that need to be resolved, and that service of the summons is not an issue as Mrs. Yabut has responded. Scott Bassin informed the court that they have never agreed to fully represent Mr. Khiani, that they are only specially appearing today because the filing had a short response time and that after today, they will no longer be appearing. Mr. Khiani stated that he needs 60 days as he is in the process of working out a contract agreement with an attorney. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, and the Petition for Lost Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed are continued to April 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Khiani that he needs to have a lawyer, or he will be representing himself.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
